checkpoints.label: Before Merge
checkpoints.description: Approval required before merging reconstructed files into the backend codebase.

checkpoints.label: Before Deployment
checkpoints.description: Approval required before pushing files to the production hosting target.

checkpoints.label: Before Deletion
checkpoints.description: Approval required before permanently deleting files or artefacts.

checkpoints.label: Before Rollback
checkpoints.description: Approval required before rolling back a deployment to a previous version.
